contractErrors._description: User-friendly messages for smart contract errors
contractErrors.AccessControlBadConfirmation: Access confirmation failed. Please try the operation again.
contractErrors.AccessControlUnauthorizedAccount: You don't have permission to perform this action. Please contact support if you believe this is an error.
contractErrors.AccountIsFlagged: This account has been flagged for review. Please contact support for assistance.
contractErrors.AddressAlreadyUsed: This wallet address is already associated with another account. Please use a different wallet.
contractErrors.AddressEmptyCode: The contract at this address is not valid. Please contact support.
contractErrors.AlreadyAttested: This attestation has already been recorded. No further action is needed.
contractErrors.AlreadyDisputed: A dispute has already been filed for this transaction. Check your disputes page for status.
contractErrors.AlreadyInitialized: This operation has already been completed. Please refresh the page.
contractErrors.AlreadyProcessed: This request has already been processed. Please check your transaction history.
contractErrors.AlreadyQualified: You're already qualified for this action. Please proceed to the next step.
contractErrors.AlreadyRegistered: You're already registered. Please log in to your existing account instead.
contractErrors.AlreadyResolved: This dispute has already been resolved. Check your notifications for the outcome.
contractErrors.AlreadyValidated: This item has already been validated. No further action is needed.
contractErrors.AlreadyVerified: Your verification is already complete. Please proceed to the next step.
contractErrors.AlreadyVoted: You've already voted on this proposal. Thank you for participating!
contractErrors.AmountTooLarge: The amount you entered is too large. Please enter a smaller amount.
contractErrors.ArrayLengthMismatch: There was a data mismatch in your request. Please try again or contact support.
contractErrors.AttestationExpired: Your verification has expired. Please request a new verification and try again.
contractErrors.BelowMinimum: The amount is below the minimum required. Please increase the amount and try again.
contractErrors.BonusAlreadyClaimed: You've already claimed this bonus. Check your rewards page for other available bonuses.
contractErrors.CannotMixPrivacyModes: You cannot mix private and public transactions in the same operation. Please separate them.
contractErrors.CannotReportSelf: You cannot report yourself. Please select a different user to report.
contractErrors.ChainNotSupported: This blockchain network is not currently supported. Please switch to a supported network.
contractErrors.ChallengePeriodActive: This action is currently in a challenge period. Please wait for it to complete.
contractErrors.ClaimDeadlineExpired: The deadline to claim this reward has passed. Please contact support for assistance.
contractErrors.ComplianceCallFailed: Compliance verification failed. Please ensure your KYC is complete and try again.
contractErrors.ComplianceCheckFailed: You did not pass the compliance check for this asset. Please complete KYC verification.
contractErrors.ComplianceCheckTimeout: Compliance verification timed out. Please try again in a few moments.
contractErrors.DailyBonusLimitExceeded: You've reached the daily limit for this bonus type. Please try again tomorrow.
contractErrors.DailyLimitExceeded: You've reached your daily limit for this action. Please try again tomorrow.
contractErrors.DeadlineExpired: The deadline for this action has passed. Please start a new request.
contractErrors.DepositAlreadyRefunded: This deposit has already been refunded. Check your wallet for the refund.
contractErrors.DeviceLimitExceeded: You've reached the maximum number of devices for your account. Please remove a device first.
contractErrors.DisputeTooEarly: It's too early to file a dispute. Please wait for the required period to pass.
contractErrors.DistributionNotDue: Reward distribution is not yet due. Please check back at the scheduled time.
contractErrors.DuplicateSignature: This signature has already been used. Please sign a new message.
contractErrors.ECDSAInvalidSignature: Your wallet signature is invalid. Please try signing again.
contractErrors.ECDSAInvalidSignatureLength: Your wallet signature has an invalid format. Please try signing again.
contractErrors.ECDSAInvalidSignatureS: Your wallet signature contains invalid data. Please try signing again.
contractErrors.ERC1967InvalidImplementation: Contract upgrade failed due to invalid implementation. Please contact support.
contractErrors.ERC1967NonPayable: This contract does not accept direct payments. Please use the proper interface.
contractErrors.ERC20InsufficientAllowance: You haven't approved enough tokens for this transaction. Please approve the required amount first.
contractErrors.ERC20InsufficientBalance: You don't have enough tokens for this transaction. Please add more tokens to your wallet.
contractErrors.ERC20InvalidApprover: Token approval failed. Please try approving again.
contractErrors.ERC20InvalidReceiver: The recipient address is invalid. Please check the address and try again.
contractErrors.ERC20InvalidSender: The sender address is invalid. Please reconnect your wallet.
contractErrors.ERC20InvalidSpender: The spender address is invalid. Please try the operation again.
contractErrors.ERC2612ExpiredSignature: Your permit signature has expired. Please sign a new permit.
contractErrors.ERC2612InvalidSigner: The permit signature is invalid. Please sign a new permit with your wallet.
contractErrors.EmailAlreadyUsed: This email address is already registered. Please use a different email or log in to your existing account.
contractErrors.EmailNotVerified: Please verify your email address before continuing. Check your inbox for the verification link.
contractErrors.EnforcedPause: This feature is temporarily paused for maintenance. Please try again later.
contractErrors.EpochAlreadyProcessed: This reward period has already been processed. Check your wallet for any rewards.
contractErrors.EscrowExpired: This escrow has expired. The funds will be returned according to the escrow terms.
contractErrors.EscrowNotFound: The escrow you're looking for doesn't exist. Please check your order details.
contractErrors.ExceedsConversionLimit: This amount exceeds the conversion limit. Please try a smaller amount.
contractErrors.ExceedsMaximum: The amount exceeds the maximum allowed. Please reduce the amount and try again.
contractErrors.ExpectedPause: This action requires the system to be paused. Please contact support.
contractErrors.FailedCall: The transaction failed to execute. Please try again or contact support.
contractErrors.FutureEpoch: This reward period hasn't started yet. Please wait for the scheduled time.
contractErrors.GloballyPaused: The platform is currently under maintenance. Please try again shortly.
contractErrors.IDAlreadyUsed: This ID has already been used for verification. Please contact support if you need assistance.
contractErrors.IDVerificationRequired: Please complete ID verification to continue. Visit the KYC page to get started.
contractErrors.IdenticalTokens: You cannot swap a token for itself. Please select different tokens.
contractErrors.IndexOutOfBounds: An internal error occurred. Please refresh the page and try again.
contractErrors.InsufficientAttestations: More verifications are needed to complete this action. Please wait for additional confirmations.
contractErrors.InsufficientBalance: You don't have enough balance for this transaction. Please add funds to your wallet.
contractErrors.InsufficientDeposit: Your deposit is insufficient for this action. Please add more funds.
contractErrors.InsufficientInputAmount: The input amount is too small. Please increase the amount.
contractErrors.InsufficientLiquidity: There isn't enough liquidity for this trade. Please try a smaller amount or wait for more liquidity.
contractErrors.InsufficientLiquidityBurned: Not enough liquidity tokens to burn. Please check your liquidity position.
contractErrors.InsufficientLiquidityMinted: The liquidity provision resulted in too few tokens. Please try with different amounts.
contractErrors.InsufficientLockedFunds: There aren't enough locked funds for this withdrawal. Please check your locked balances.
contractErrors.InsufficientOutputAmount: The output amount is below the minimum acceptable. Please adjust your slippage settings.
contractErrors.InsufficientPoolBalance: The pool doesn't have enough balance. Please try a smaller amount.
contractErrors.InsufficientPrivateBalance: Your private balance is insufficient. Please convert more tokens to private mode.
contractErrors.InsufficientRewardPool: The reward pool is currently depleted. Please check back later.
contractErrors.InsufficientSignatures: More signatures are required to approve this action. Please wait for other approvers.
contractErrors.InsufficientSimilarity: The verification data doesn't match closely enough. Please try again with clearer information.
contractErrors.InsufficientStake: You need to stake more tokens to perform this action. Visit the staking page to increase your stake.
contractErrors.InvalidAccountNonce: Your transaction nonce is incorrect. Please refresh the page and try again.
contractErrors.InvalidAddress: The address you entered is invalid. Please check and enter a valid address.
contractErrors.InvalidAmount: The amount you entered is invalid. Please enter a valid positive amount.
contractErrors.InvalidBLSKey: The validator key is invalid. Please regenerate your validator keys.
contractErrors.InvalidBLSPublicKey: The validator public key is invalid. Please check your validator configuration.
contractErrors.InvalidChainId: You're connected to the wrong network. Please switch to the correct network in your wallet.
contractErrors.InvalidClaimIndex: The claim reference is invalid. Please refresh and try again.
contractErrors.InvalidClaimNonce: Your claim request is outdated. Please refresh the page and try again.
contractErrors.InvalidCodecID: An internal encoding error occurred. Please contact support.
contractErrors.InvalidCommitment: The commitment data is invalid. Please try the operation again.
contractErrors.InvalidContributionIndex: The contribution reference is invalid. Please refresh and try again.
contractErrors.InvalidContributionType: The contribution type is not valid. Please select a valid option.
contractErrors.InvalidDuration: The duration you selected is invalid. Please choose a valid time period.
contractErrors.InvalidFee: The fee amount is invalid. Please check the fee settings.
contractErrors.InvalidInitialization: Contract initialization failed. Please contact support.
contractErrors.InvalidKYCProviderSignature: KYC verification failed. Please try verifying again.
contractErrors.InvalidKYCTier: The KYC tier specified is not valid. Please check your KYC status.
contractErrors.InvalidMerkleProof: Verification of your claim failed. Please contact support.
contractErrors.InvalidMessageLength: Your message is too long or too short. Please adjust the length.
contractErrors.InvalidMessageType: The message format is not recognized. Please try again.
contractErrors.InvalidNodeID: The validator node ID is invalid. Please check your configuration.
contractErrors.InvalidNodeType: The node type specified is not valid. Please check your settings.
contractErrors.InvalidNonce: Your transaction is outdated. Please refresh the page and try again.
contractErrors.InvalidOrderStatus: This order cannot be modified in its current state. Please check the order details.
contractErrors.InvalidPair: This trading pair is not valid. Please select a different pair.
contractErrors.InvalidParameter: One of the values you entered is invalid. Please check your inputs.
contractErrors.InvalidPath: The swap path is invalid. Please try a different route.
contractErrors.InvalidPoolTypeForMerkle: This pool type doesn't support this claim method. Please contact support.
contractErrors.InvalidProof: The verification proof is invalid. Please try again.
contractErrors.InvalidProvider: The service provider is not recognized. Please try again.
contractErrors.InvalidRecipient: The recipient address is invalid. Please check and try again.
contractErrors.InvalidReferrer: The referral link you used is invalid. You can continue without a referrer or get a valid referral link.
contractErrors.InvalidReportIndex: The report reference is invalid. Please refresh and try again.
contractErrors.InvalidReviewIndex: The review reference is invalid. Please refresh and try again.
contractErrors.InvalidShortString: The text you entered is too short. Please enter more characters.
contractErrors.InvalidSignature: Your signature is invalid. Please try signing again with your wallet.
contractErrors.InvalidStars: Please select a valid star rating between 1 and 5.
contractErrors.InvalidTier: The tier you selected is not valid. Please choose a valid tier.
contractErrors.InvalidUserSignature: Your wallet signature couldn't be verified. Please try signing again.
contractErrors.InvalidVerificationProof: Your verification couldn't be confirmed. Please try the verification process again.
contractErrors.InvalidVerifierSignature: The verifier's signature is invalid. Please contact support.
contractErrors.InvalidVoteType: Please select a valid voting option.
contractErrors.InvalidWarpResponse: Cross-chain communication failed. Please try again.
contractErrors.KValueDecreased: This trade would destabilize the liquidity pool. Please try a smaller amount.
contractErrors.KYCRequired: KYC verification is required for this action. Please complete your KYC first.
contractErrors.KYCTier1Required: Basic KYC verification is required. Please complete KYC Tier 1 to continue.
contractErrors.KYCTier2Required: Enhanced KYC verification is required. Please complete KYC Tier 2 to continue.
contractErrors.KycTier1Required: Basic KYC verification is required. Please complete KYC Tier 1 to continue.
contractErrors.Locked: This asset is currently locked and cannot be moved. Please wait for the lock period to end.
contractErrors.MaxValidatorsReached: The maximum number of validators has been reached. Please try again later.
contractErrors.MessageAlreadyProcessed: This message has already been processed. No further action is needed.
contractErrors.MustSendFunds: This action requires sending funds. Please include the required amount.
contractErrors.NativeTransferFailed: The transfer of native tokens failed. Please check your balance and try again.
contractErrors.NoFeesToDistribute: There are no fees to distribute at this time. Please check back later.
contractErrors.NoPendingReferralBonus: You don't have any pending referral bonuses to claim.
contractErrors.NoRewardsToClaim: You don't have any rewards to claim at this time. Keep participating to earn rewards!
contractErrors.NodeNotActive: This validator node is not currently active. Please check the node status.
contractErrors.NodeNotFound: The validator node couldn't be found. Please verify the node ID.
contractErrors.NonceAlreadyUsed: This verification code has already been used. Please request a new code.
contractErrors.NotAMM: This operation is only available for automated market makers.
contractErrors.NotFactory: This operation requires factory authorization. Please contact support.
contractErrors.NotInitialized: The system hasn't been initialized yet. Please try again shortly.
contractErrors.NotInitializing: This operation can only be performed during initialization.
contractErrors.NotParticipant: You're not a participant in this activity. Please join first to participate.
contractErrors.NotQualified: You don't meet the requirements for this action. Please check the eligibility criteria.
contractErrors.NotRegistered: You need to register before performing this action. Please sign up first.
contractErrors.NotRegistrar: You don't have registrar permissions for this action.
contractErrors.NotValidator: You must be a validator to perform this action. Consider becoming a validator.
contractErrors.NotValidatorOwner: Only the validator owner can perform this action.
contractErrors.OddaoAddressNotSet: System configuration is incomplete. Please contact support.
contractErrors.OnlyVerifier: Only authorized verifiers can perform this action.
contractErrors.OrderNotFound: The order you're looking for doesn't exist. It may have been filled or cancelled.
contractErrors.Overflow: The calculation resulted in a number that's too large. Please try with smaller amounts.
contractErrors.OwnableInvalidOwner: The ownership transfer failed due to an invalid owner address.
contractErrors.OwnableUnauthorizedAccount: You're not authorized to perform this administrative action.
contractErrors.PayoutFailed: The payout failed to process. Please try again or contact support.
contractErrors.PhoneAlreadyUsed: This phone number is already associated with another account. Please use a different number.
contractErrors.PoolAlreadyExists: This liquidity pool already exists. You can add liquidity to the existing pool.
contractErrors.PoolDoesNotExist: This liquidity pool doesn't exist yet. Consider creating it.
contractErrors.PoolNotFound: The liquidity pool couldn't be found. Please check the pool details.
contractErrors.PoolPaused: This liquidity pool is temporarily paused. Please try again later.
contractErrors.PreviousTierRequired: Please complete the previous tier before advancing to this one.
contractErrors.PrivacyNotAvailable: Privacy features are not currently available. Please try again later.
contractErrors.ProofExpired: Your verification proof has expired. Please request a new verification.
contractErrors.ProposalAlreadyExecuted: This proposal has already been executed. Check the results.
contractErrors.ProposalNotActive: This proposal is not currently active for voting.
contractErrors.ProposalNotPassed: This proposal did not pass the vote and cannot be executed.
contractErrors.QuorumNotReached: Not enough votes were cast to reach quorum. The proposal cannot proceed.
contractErrors.ReasonTooShort: Please provide a more detailed reason for your action.
contractErrors.ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall: A security check prevented this transaction. Please try again.
contractErrors.RegistrationContractNotSet: System configuration is incomplete. Please contact support.
contractErrors.RegistrationsDisabled: New registrations are temporarily disabled. Please try again later.
contractErrors.ReportAlreadyPending: You already have a pending report for this item. Please wait for it to be reviewed.
contractErrors.ReportNotFound: The report you're looking for doesn't exist.
contractErrors.RevealDeadlinePassed: The deadline to reveal your vote has passed.
contractErrors.SafeERC20FailedOperation: The token operation failed. Please check your token balance and try again.
contractErrors.SelfReferralNotAllowed: You cannot use yourself as a referrer. Please use a valid referral link.
contractErrors.SlippageExceeded: The price moved too much during your transaction. Please try again with higher slippage tolerance.
contractErrors.SocialAlreadyUsed: This social account is already linked to another user. Please use a different account.
contractErrors.StakeLocked: Your stake is currently locked. Please wait for the lock period to end.
contractErrors.StakeNotFound: No stake was found for your account. Please stake tokens first.
contractErrors.StringTooLong: The text you entered is too long. Please shorten it and try again.
contractErrors.TokenAlreadyRegistered: This token is already registered on the platform.
contractErrors.TokenNotRegistered: This token is not registered on the platform. Please use a supported token.
contractErrors.TooManyOrders: You have too many open orders. Please cancel some orders first.
contractErrors.TooManyRecipients: Too many recipients specified. Please reduce the number of recipients.
contractErrors.TransactionAlreadyUsed: This transaction has already been processed.
contractErrors.TransferLimitExceeded: This transfer exceeds your limit. Please try a smaller amount or complete KYC to increase your limit.
contractErrors.TransferNotFound: The transfer record couldn't be found. Please check the transaction details.
contractErrors.TrustedVerificationKeyNotSet: System verification is not configured. Please contact support.
contractErrors.UUPSUnauthorizedCallContext: Contract upgrade not authorized. Please contact support.
contractErrors.UUPSUnsupportedProxiableUUID: Contract upgrade failed due to version mismatch. Please contact support.
contractErrors.Unauthorized: You're not authorized to perform this action. Please check your permissions.
contractErrors.UnauthorizedSigner: The signature is from an unauthorized signer. Please use the correct wallet.
contractErrors.UnauthorizedTransactionRecorder: Transaction recording is not authorized from this source.
contractErrors.UntrustedKYCProvider: The KYC provider is not trusted. Please use an authorized verification method.
contractErrors.UnusedParameter: An internal parameter error occurred. Please try again.
contractErrors.UserNotCompliant: Your account doesn't meet compliance requirements for this asset. Please complete KYC.
contractErrors.UserNotRegistered: This user is not registered. Please complete registration first.
contractErrors.ReferrerKycRequired: Your referrer has not completed identity verification (KYC Tier 1). Please proceed without a referral code or ask your referrer to complete verification first.
contractErrors.ValidatorCannotBeReferrer: Validators cannot be used as referrers. Please use a regular user's referral link.
contractErrors.ValidatorNotFound: The validator couldn't be found. Please check the validator address.
contractErrors.VotingNotEnded: Voting is still in progress. Please wait for voting to end.
contractErrors.WarpMessageFailed: Cross-chain message failed. Please try again.
contractErrors.ZeroAddress: An invalid zero address was provided. Please check the address.
contractErrors.ZeroAddressNotAllowed: The address field cannot be empty. Please enter a valid address.
contractErrors.ZeroAmount: The amount cannot be zero. Please enter a positive amount.
contractErrors.ZeroAmountNotAllowed: The amount cannot be zero. Please enter a positive amount.
contractErrors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred (Code: {{code}}). Please try again. If this persists, contact support with this code.
contractErrors.fallback: Something went wrong. Please try again. If the problem continues, please contact support.
contractErrors.userRejected: You cancelled the transaction. Please try again when ready.
contractErrors.insufficientGas: Insufficient funds to pay for gas. Please add more AVAX to your wallet for transaction fees.
contractErrors.nonceError: Transaction nonce error. Please refresh the page and try again.
contractErrors.gasEstimationFailed: Unable to estimate gas for this transaction. The transaction may fail. Please try again or contact support.
contractErrors.networkError: Network connection error. Please check your internet connection and try again.
contractErrors.timeout: The request timed out. Please check your connection and try again.
